views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing currently-reading books as cards with progress rings (currentPage/totalPages), today's pages and minutes stats, reading streak counter, yearly book goal arc, and a quick-log floating action button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Log a reading session: pick an existing in-progress book (auto-fills author, genre, totalPages, last currentPage) or start a new book. Record pages read, time spent, update status, optionally rate on completion, and jot notes or highlights

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Reading journal showing all sessions grouped by date, with book title, pages read, duration, and notes preview. Calendar heatmap shows reading intensity per day. Filter by book title or status

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Rich analytics: weekly pages bar chart, monthly books-completed timeline, genre distribution donut chart, reading pace trend line, yearly goal progress, and computed insights about habits and predictions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayPagesRead
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of pagesRead for all entries dated today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayReadingMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of readingMinutes for all entries dated today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive calendar days ending today (or yesterday) where at least one entry has pagesRead > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum consecutive reading days ever recorded across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: booksInProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.type: [(title: String, author: String, currentPage: Int, totalPages: Int, progressPercent: Double)]
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Deduplicated list of books with latest status == .reading, using most recent entry's currentPage and totalPages to compute progress percentage

viewModelComputedProperties.name: booksCompletedThisYear
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct bookTitles with at least one entry where status == .completed and date falls in the current calendar year

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPagesRead
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total pagesRead across all entries in the last 7 calendar days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averagePagesPerDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total pagesRead over last 30 days divided by 30, giving a smoothed daily average

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPagesTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 data points — one per day for the last week — with total pagesRead per day, for a bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyBooksChart
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Books completed per calendar month for the last 12 months, for a bar or line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: genreDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of completed books grouped by BookGenre for a donut/pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: readingPaceTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's avg pages/day divided by last week's avg pages/day. Above 1.0 means pace is improving, below 1.0 means slowing down

viewModelComputedProperties.name: estimatedCompletionDays
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each in-progress book: (totalPages - currentPage) / rolling 7-day avg pagesRead for that specific book

viewModelComputedProperties.name: readingInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamic array of human-readable insight strings generated from streak milestones, pace changes, goal progress, genre diversity, personal records, and completion predictions

dailyGoal.description: Target number of pages to read per day

yearlyGoal.description: Target number of books to complete per calendar year

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A calendar day counts as a reading day if any entry on that day has pagesRead > 0. The streak is consecutive calendar days — missing one day resets it.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: compare this week's average daily pages to previous week. Secondary trend: monthly books completed plotted against the linear pace needed to hit yearly goal (yearlyGoal/12 per month). Reading speed tracked as pages per minute when both pagesRead and readingMinutes are recorded.
insights: Streak milestones: celebrate 7, 14, 30, 60, 100, 365 consecutive reading days
Pace comparison: 'You read 23% more pages this week vs last week' or 'Reading pace dipped — 18 pages/day vs 25 last week'
Completion prediction: 'At your current pace, you'll finish [BookTitle] in ~12 days (around Mar 17)'
Yearly goal tracking: 'You've completed 8 of 24 books — 2 books ahead of schedule' or '1 book behind pace, need ~2.5 books/month to catch up'
Genre diversity: 'You've explored 5 of 12 genres this year. Your most-read genre is Non-Fiction (40%)'
Personal records: 'New daily record! 87 pages on Sunday' or 'Fastest book this year: finished in 9 days'
Consistency patterns: 'You average 42 pages on weekends vs 18 on weekdays — Sundays are your best reading day'
Book velocity trend: 'Average 16 days per book this year, improving from 22 days last quarter'
